parameters.query: SELECT ac.nom, ac.complexity, ac.setup_price, ac.monthly_price, t.nom_entreprise AS client_name FROM automation_catalog ac, tenants t WHERE ac.id = '{{ $json.automationId }}'::uuid AND ac.is_active = true AND t.id = '{{ $json.tenantId }}'::uuid

INSERT INTO automation_purchases (tenant_id, automation_id, status, setup_price_paid, monthly_price, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('{{ $('02. Valider').first().json.tenantId }}'::uuid, '{{ $('02. Valider').first().json.automationId }}'::uuid, 'en_attente', {{ $json.setup_price }}, {{ $json.monthly_price }}, NOW(), NOW()) ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, automation_id) DO UPDATE SET status = 'en_attente', updated_at = NOW() RETURNING id
SELECT u.email FROM users u WHERE u.role = 'super_admin' LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO notifications (tenant_id, type, titre, message, donnees, lu, created_at) SELECT t.id, 'automation_request', 'Demande activation', '{{ $json.clientName }} demande {{ $json.automationNom }}', '{}'::jsonb, false, NOW() FROM tenants t JOIN users u ON u.tenant_id = t.id WHERE u.role = 'super_admin' LIMIT 1

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ from: 'TalosPrimes ', to: [$('06. Preparer notif').first().json.adminEmail || 'direction@talosprimes.com'], subject: 'Demande activation : ' + $('06. Preparer notif').first().json.clientName + ' - ' + $('06. Preparer notif').first().json.automationNom, html: '

Nouvelle demande

' + $('06. Preparer notif').first().json.clientName + ' demande l\'activation de ' + $('06. Preparer notif').first().json.automationNom + '.

Complexite : ' + $('06. Preparer notif').first().json.complexity + ' | Setup : ' + $('06. Preparer notif').first().json.setupPrice + ' EUR | Mensuel : ' + $('06. Preparer notif').first().json.monthlyPrice + ' EUR/mois

Voir la demande

' }) }}
